ddt:Target.Name: FrontCamera_SUV_SW3.1_V2
ddt:Target.Description:
Date of Creation: 07/05/2019 Author: Enrico Stabile SW: 3.1 PVal: Pval_FrontCam_SUV_SW3.1
Notes: TxMaxDataLength: 8 -> fixed at 8 for reflashing purposes. For the moment, SW is not respecting ISO requirement on DataLength flexibility DR: Ref17v5.8
V2 Screens updated added missing DID 4033 4034 for alignment result storage

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear

Data.Name: DTCStatusAvailabilityMask
Data.Comment: DTCSAM

Data.Name: SPC NG Reason
Data.Comment: "Aiming NG Reason (When SPC Result is ""NOK"", this reason is displayed.) Refer to ""FrontCamera_SPC

Data.Name: Factory Aiming Yaw
Data.Comment: "Aiming Yaw Result (For ""Normal Mode"", this result for Yaw.) *Refer to ""FrontCamera_Aiming_Flow_f

Data.Name: Factory Aiming Roll
Data.Comment: "Aiming Roll Result (For ""Normal Mode"", this result for Roll.) *Refer to ""FrontCamera_Aiming_Flow

Data.Name: Factory Aiming Pitch
Data.Comment: "Aiming Pitch Result (For ""Normal Mode"", this result for Pitch.) *Refer to ""FrontCamera_Aiming_Fl

Data.Name: StatusOfDTC
Data.Comment: StatusOfDTC

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailed
Data.Comment: TF

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailedThisMonitoringCycle
Data.Comment: TFTMC

Data.Name: DTCStatus.pendingDTC
Data.Comment: PDTC

Data.Name: DTCStatus.confirmedDTC
Data.Comment: CDTC

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: TNCSLC

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: TFSLC

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testNotCompletedThisMonitoringCycle
Data.Comment: TNCTMC

Data.Name: DTCStatus.warningIndicatorRequested
Data.Comment: WIR

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFailureType
Data.Comment: Pending

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCMaskRecord
Data.Comment: DTCMREC_DTC

Data.Name: DTCRecord
Data.Comment: DTCASR_DTC

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Aiming Done
Data.Comment: "Aiming Done (Finish or Not Finish) *Refer to ""FrontCamera_Aiming_Flow_for C1A_v1.xls"". Refer to "

Data.Name: Aiming Result
Data.Comment: "Aiming Result (OK or NOK) *Refer to ""FrontCamera_Aiming_Flow_for C1A_v1.xls"". Refer to ""FrontCam

Data.Name: Aiming NG Reason
Data.Comment: "Aiming NG Reason (When Aiming Result is ""NOK"", this reason is displayed.) *Refer to ""FrontCamera

Item.Text: TAC converged successfully but the result exceeds the max roll angle threshold
TAC converged successfully but the result exceed the min/max horizon and/or yaw
Distance to target out of valid range
Square side size (or radius) is out of valid logical range - defined target size is too small to be recognized.
TAC2 converged successfully but the result exceeds the min/max yaw
TAC2 converged successfully but the result exceeds the min/max horizon

Data.Name: Check Aiming Yaw
Data.Comment: "Check Aiming Yaw Result (For ""Aiming Check Mode"", this result for Yaw.) *Refer to ""FrontCamera_A

Data.Name: Check Aiming Roll
Data.Comment: "Check Aiming Roll Result (For ""Aiming Check Mode"", this result for Roll.) *Refer to ""FrontCamera

Data.Name: Check Aiming Pitch
Data.Comment: "Check Aiming Pitch Result (For ""Aiming Check Mode"", this result for Pitch.) *Refer to ""FrontCame

Data.Name: DID_Dev.Dev frames_TargetSimulationMode
Data.Comment: Select Target Simulation Mode

Item.Text: Fusion track simulation on CAN - Polar Co-ordinates
Fusion track simulation on CAN - Cartesean Co-ordinates

Data.Name: DID_Dev.Dev frames_Communication Interface Version
Data.Comment: Activate/deactivate the frame

Data.Name: DID_Dev.Number of tracks
Data.Comment: Number of tracks frames sent on the CAN.

Data.Name: DID_Dev.Debug frames simulink
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the frames

Data.Name: DID_Dev.Debug frames Supplier
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the frames --> if supplier uses specific frames for debug.

Data.Name: DID_Dev.LineDetectionSimulationMode
Data.Comment: "Allow to activate/deactivate the LineDetectionSimulationMode. See LSS specification."

Data.Name: DID_Dev.LSS_LaneInformation
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate debug frames related to lane.

Data.Name: DID_Dev.OSP
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP ST packages. Activate/desactivate the frame"

Data.Name: DID_Dev.targets
Data.Comment: Activate/deactivate the frames

Data.Name: Blindness_algorithm
Data.Comment: Activate/deactivate the blindness detection alghorithm

Data.Name: DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: XCP_Protocol_Activation
Data.Comment: Activate/deactivate possibility to use xcp protocol

Data.Name: param_veh.P_sys_m_VehicleWidth
Data.Comment: "Vehicle width. See LDW/LKA package. *Refer to sheet ""Nissan parameter""."

Data.Name: param_veh.P_sys_x_FourWheelSteering
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable (1) or deactivate (0) the rear wheel steering frame check.

Data.Name: param_veh.P_sys_x_LeftRightSteeringWheel
Data.Comment: This parameter indicates if the vehicle is left or right hand side.

Data.Name: Calib_Config_finished.P_sys_x_SupplierCalibFinished
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if calibration by supplier has been made.

Item.Text: ECU is not calibrated in supplier plant.
ECU is calibrated in supplier plant.

Data.Name: Calib_Config_finished.P_sys_x_SupplierConfigFinished
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if configuration by supplier has been made.

Item.Text: ECU is not configued in supplier plant.
ECU is configured in supplier plant.

Data.Name: Calib_Config_finished.P_sys_x_RenaultCalibFinished
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the ECU is calibrated or not. By default, this value is equal to 0. This p

Item.Text: ECU is not calibrated in Renault plant.
ECU is calibrated in Renault plant.

Data.Name: Calib_Config_finished.P_sys_x_RenaultConfigFinished
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the ECU is configured or not. By default, this value is equal to 0. This p

Item.Text: ECU is not configured in Renault plant.
ECU is configured in Renault plant.

Data.Name: Radnav.Radnav_configuration_status
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the vehicle is fitted with Radio Navigation or Not. Allows to choose betwe

Data.Name: Heater_System.Heater_System_Presence
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the vehicle is fitted with Heater system, heater windshield or Nothing.

Data.Name: Heater_System.Tdegiv_cam_max
Data.Comment: This parameter defines the maximum time the system will be activate

Data.Name: AEB_Configuration
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the vehicle is fitted with AEB function.

Data.Name: ACC_Configuration
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the vehicle is fitted with ACC function.

Data.Name: TJP_Configuration
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the vehicle is fitted with TJP function.

Data.Name: Supply_voltage.Supply_voltage
Data.Comment: Current value of Supply voltage.

Data.Name: Vehicle_Type
Data.Comment: "Vehicle variant. is used by LSS model"

Data.Name: ADB.ADB_enable
Data.Comment: Activation or not of ADB function.

Data.Name: ADB_Reflector_Brightness_factor_THRES
Data.Comment: See ADB STR_COMP.

Data.Name: ADB_Enable_clustering
Data.Comment: "See ADB STR_COMP. Activation or not of Clustering"

Data.Name: AHL.AHL_enable
Data.Comment: "See AHL STR_COMP. Activation or not of AHL function."

Data.Name: OSP_TSR.OSP_TSR_enable
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Activation or not of OSP/TSR function."

Data.Name: AHL_Config.MAX_ON_COMING_DISTANCE_DUAL
Data.Comment: "See AHL STR_COMP. Minimum detection distance for oncoming vehicle with dual light source"

Data.Name: AHL_Config.MAX_ON_COMING_DISTANCE_SINGLE
Data.Comment: "See AHL STR_COMP. Minimum detection distance for oncoming vehicle with only one light source."

Data.Name: AHL_Config.MAX_LEADING_DISTANCE_DUAL
Data.Comment: "See AHL STR_COMP. Minimum detection distance for leading vehicle with dual light source."

Data.Name: AHL_Config.MAX_LEADING_DISTANCE_SINGLE
Data.Comment: "See AHL STR_COMP. Minimum detection distance for leading vehicle with only one light source."

Data.Name: AHL_Config.LIT_AREA_THRES_IN
Data.Comment: "See AHL & ADB STR_COMP. Maximum light threshold of lit area, low beam are activated if measured lig

Data.Name: AHL_Config.LIT_AREA_THRES_OUT
Data.Comment: "See AHL & ADB STR_COMP. Minimum light threshold of lit area, high beam are activated if measured li

Data.Name: AHL_Config.DELAY_OPPOSITE.
Data.Comment: "See AHL STR_COMP. Commutation delay after crossing an oncoming Target vehicle The resulting delay b

Data.Name: AHL_Config.DELAY_OVERTAKING
Data.Comment: "See AHL STR_COMP. Commutation delay after overtaking an overtaking Target vehicle The resulting del

Data.Name: AHL_Config.DELAY_LOST
Data.Comment: "See AHL STR_COMP. Delay to be applied before switch back to high beam in case target vehicle has be

Data.Name: AHL_Config.SPEED_THRES_INF
Data.Comment: "See AHL STR_COMP. Threshold of speed to activate AHL system. (real speed ? cluster speed)"

Data.Name: AHL_Config.SPEED_THRES_SUP
Data.Comment: "See AHL STR_COMP. Threshold of speed to deactivate AHL system. (real speed ? cluster speed)"

Data.Name: AHL_Config.AMBIENT_LIGHT_THRES_SUP
Data.Comment: "See AHL & ADB STR_COMP. Threshold of ambient light to deactivate AHL system."

Data.Name: AHL_Config.AMBIENT_LIGHT_THRES_INF
Data.Comment: "See AHL & ADB STR_COMP. Threshold of ambient light to activate AHL system."

Data.Name: OSP_NAVSPEEDSELECTION.OSP_NAVSPEEDSELECTION
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. For OSP function : configuration to use or not of “non-verified” speed limits

Item.Text: use of only verified speed limits

Data.Name: OSP_TSR_Mode.OSP_TSR_Mode
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. OSP/TSR function gives in this DID its current status whether it receives dat

Data.Name: Country Code
Data.Comment: "Country code See 'Country Code' sheet for details (this is based on Renault/Nissan 328 MTC object).

Data.Name: FrCam_Vehicle.Camera_Bottom
Data.Comment: "Masking area in FOV from bottom side *Refer to sheet ""Nissan parameter"" sheet."

Data.Name: FrCam_Vehicle.Camera_Height
Data.Comment: "Camera height from ground *Refer to sheet ""Nissan parameter"" sheet."

Data.Name: FrCam_Vehicle.Distance_camera_front_axle_center
Data.Comment: "Longitudinal distance between the camera (middle of the lens) and the front axle center in systems'

Data.Name: FrCam_Vehicle.Distance_front_axle_to_bumper
Data.Comment: "Longitudinal distance between front axle origin and systems' referential origin (front bumber) *Ref

Data.Name: FrCam_Vehicle.Distance_camera_vehicle_centerline
Data.Comment: "Lateral distance between the camera and vehicle center line in systems' referential (origin : front

Data.Name: Camera_Delta_Height.Camera_Delta_Height
Data.Comment: Camera height correction value from nominal camera height

Data.Name: Camera Pitch Angle (?c)
Data.Comment: "Camera pitch angle from ground line *Refer to sheet ""Nissan parameter""."

Data.Name: Referential_Translation.Referential_Yaw_Rotation_Parameter
Data.Comment: Yaw rotation between camera's referential and systems' referential (front bumber)

Data.Name: Referential_Translation.Referential_Pitch_Rotation_Parameter
Data.Comment: Pitch rotation between camera's referential and systems' referential (front bumber)

Data.Name: Referential_Translation.Referential_Roll_Rotation_Parameter
Data.Comment: Roll rotation between camera's referential and systems' referential (front bumber)

Data.Name: Referential_Translation.Referential_z_Translation_Parameter
Data.Comment: Vertical distance between camera's referential origin and systems' referential origin (front bumber)

Data.Name: Ageing_Counter.Ageing_Counter
Data.Comment: Number of diagnostics cycles (how many times the diagnostics has been done for this DTC). If the num

Data.Name: Vehicle_Speed.Vehicle_Speed
Data.Comment: Vehicle's speed when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Vehicle_Warning_State.Vehicle_Warning_State
Data.Comment: Vehicle's state when the DTC has been raised.

Item.Text: "SERV" and "STOP" are ON (alert type R3& D3)

Data.Name: Vehicle_Driving_Status.Vehicle_Driving_Status
Data.Comment: Vehicle's state when the DTC has been raised.

Item.Text: Vehicle driving, without being able to determine direction

Data.Name: Braking_Pressure.Braking_Pressure
Data.Comment: Braking pressure when the DTC was raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot.LDW_LKA_Activation_Status
Data.Comment: LDW / LKA activation status when the DTC was raised.

Data.Name: Overheating_Status.Overheating_Status
Data.Comment: Overheating status when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Misalignment_Status.Misalignment_Status
Data.Comment: Misalignment status when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: EDR (Reading data)
Data.Comment: "For EDR (Reading data) Supplier to propose a solution to read data"

Data.Name: DID_OEM
Data.Comment: "Identifies if the vehicle is a Renault or a Nissan one. Linked to the LSS model input V_x_OEM_confi

Data.Name: SNOW_MAX_TEMPERATURE
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Temperature threshold for temperature filter (for snow subsign strategy)"

Data.Name: EXTERNALTEMPERATURE_STRATEGY
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Activate or not the temperature filter for snow subsign"

Data.Name: TRAILER_STRATEGY
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Activate or not the trailer filter"

Data.Name: NO_OVERTAKE.BEGIN
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Time or distance duration value for the display of no overtaking sign accordi

Data.Name: NO_OVERTAKE.END
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Time or distance duration value for the display of end of no overtaking sign

Data.Name: NO_OVERTAKE.BEGIN_MODE
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Definition on time or distance for overtaking display duration."

Data.Name: NO_OVERTAKE.END_MODE
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Definition on time or distance for end of overtaking display duration"

Data.Name: NATIONAL_SPEED.TYPE_COUNTER
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. For Nissan, time or distance counter to display de-restriction sign"

Data.Name: NATIONAL_SPEED.START_ACTIVATION_STATUS
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. At new mission, the last TSR/OSP activation status is taken into account or s

Data.Name: NATIONAL_SPEED.TYPE_COUNTER_MODE
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. For Nissan, to choose counter in time or distance to display de-restriction s

Data.Name: OSP_SL_LINK
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Activation / Deactivation of the speed limter long press display message."

Data.Name: EXT_TRAFFIC_SIGN
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Activation / Deactivation of the overtaking sign."

Item.Text: Extented Traffic Sign zone not active

Data.Name: param_veh_gearbox.P_sys_x_GearboxType
Data.Comment: Gearbox type.

Data.Name: rain_strategy.max_period_intermittent
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Time between two intermittent wiping"

Data.Name: rain_strategy.maxcountwipers
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Number of intermittant wiping"

Data.Name: rain_strategy.rain_active_delay
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Time with rain information from rain sensor"

Data.Name: rain_strategy.rain_not_active_delay
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Time without rain information from rain sensor"

Data.Name: CamAlignTM.camera_align_tm
Data.Comment: Camera Alignment Target Mode --> states how many targets should be detected by the camera in alignme

Data.Name: FLCAlignResults.Aiming_Yaw_Dynamic
Data.Comment: Difference between factory and autofix yaw

Data.Name: FLCAlignResults.Aiming Pitch dynamic
Data.Comment: Difference between factory and autofix pitch

Data.Name: FLCAlignResults.roll_delta_error
Data.Comment: Used to read Forward Looking Camera alignment values for data logging at vehicle assembly plant -->

Data.Name: FLCAlignResults.yaw_delta_error
Data.Comment: Used to read Forward Looking Camera alignment values for data logging at vehicle assembly plant -->

Data.Name: FLCAlignResults.Aiming Roll dynamic
Data.Comment: Difference between factory and autofix roll

Data.Name: FLCAlignResults.pitch_delta_error
Data.Comment: Used to read Forward Looking Camera alignment values for data logging at vehicle assembly plant -->

Data.Name: FLCAlignResults.Autofix_Returned_First_Value
Data.Comment: Binary value stating if autofix returned a value during current driving session (see "Renault_Valeo_

Data.Name: FLCAlignData.targets_separation_distance
Data.Comment: Target Separation Distance

Data.Name: FLCAlignData.targets_distance_to_front_axle
Data.Comment: Target Distance to Front Axle

Data.Name: FLCAlignData.targets_upper_height
Data.Comment: Aiming target upper height (corresponds to Nissan's parameter Htu)

Data.Name: FLCAlignData.targets_lower_height
Data.Comment: Aiming target lower height (corresponds to Nissan's parameter Htl)

Data.Name: FLCAlignData.targets_size
Data.Comment: Aiming target size (elementary shape). Depending if it the targets are circular or square, this valu

Data.Name: FLCAlignData.type_of_targets
Data.Comment: "Type of target for end of line and after sale alignment 001 = Horizontal Rects w/ 2 SP --> squared

Data.Name: FLCAlignData.Alignment_Axe_Offset
Data.Comment: Type of alignment : centered / decentered

Data.Name: Camera_focal_length
Data.Comment: Used to read Forward Looking Camera alignment values for data logging at vehicle assembly plan

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_OVER_130-SL DISPLAY MAX DIST
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign display for sign o

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_OVER_130-SL_MIN_TIME
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign (with full light) disp

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_OVER_130-SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with grey display for

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_90_130_HW-SL DISPLAY MAX DIST
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign display."

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_90_130_HW-SL_MIN_TIME
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign (with full light) disp

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_90_130_HW-SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with grey display."

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_90_130_NOT_HW-SL DISPLAY MAX DIST
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign display."

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_90_130_NOT_HW-SL_MIN_TIME
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign (with full light) disp

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_90_130_NOT_HW-SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with grey display."

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_60_80_HW-SL DISPLAY MAX DIST
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign display."

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_60_80_HW-SL_MIN_TIME
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign (with full light) disp

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_60_80_HW-SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with grey display."

Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign display."

Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign (with full light) disp

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_60_80_NOT_HW-SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with grey display."

Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign display."

Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign (with full light) disp

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_10_50_HW-SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with grey display."

Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign display."

Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign (with full light) disp

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_10_50_NOT_HW-SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with grey display."

Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the end of speed limit sign (with full ligh

Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the end of speed limit sign with grey displ

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_ENDOF_NOT_HW-SL DISPLAY MAX DIST
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in distance for the end of speed limit sign display."

Data.Name: TIMER_TSR.TIMER_ENDOF_NOT_HW-SL_EXT_TIME
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. In TSR mode, duration in time for the end of speed limit sign with grey displ

Data.Name: SL DISPLAY MAX TIME
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Time value for the confidence level decreasing (variant A)."

Data.Name: Generic_timer.90-130 HW
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. For fusion in OSP mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign detecte

Data.Name: Generic_timer.60-80 HW
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. For fusion in OSP mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign detecte

Data.Name: Generic_timer.10-50 HW
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. For fusion in OSP mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign detecte

Data.Name: Generic_timer.90-130 NOT HW
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. For fusion in OSP mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign detecte

Data.Name: Generic_timer.60-80 NOT HW
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. For fusion in OSP mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign detecte

Data.Name: Generic_timer.10-50 NOT HW
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. For fusion in OSP mode, duration in distance for the speed limit sign detecte

Data.Name: Generic_timer.SL_WITH_SUPP
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. For fusion in OSP mode, duration in time for the speed limit sign with subsig

Data.Name: SL_LOW_THRESHOLD.KPH
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Threshold in KPH before displaying the long press button message."

Data.Name: SL_LOW_THRESHOLD.MPH
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Threshold in MPH before displaying the long press button message."

Data.Name: RECORD_SPEED_THD
Data.Comment: See TSR/OSP STR_COMP.

Data.Name: Overspeed.Overspeed_detect_time
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Overspeed detection time (hysteresis)"

Data.Name: Overspeed.Overspeed_tolerance_kmh
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Overspeed tolerance (hysteresis)"

Data.Name: Overspeed.Overspeed_tolerance_mph
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Overspeed tolerance (hysteresis)"

Data.Name: Overspeed.Start_detect_rain
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Time with activated wipers"

Data.Name: Overspeed.Stop_detect_rain
Data.Comment: "See TSR/OSP STR_COMP. Time withe deactivated wipers"

Data.Name: Autofix_Activation
Data.Comment: allow to enable/disable autofix

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Conf.Min_Lane_Width
Data.Comment: This is minimum Lane width of LDW activation.

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Early_bool_LDW_Config.warnings_on
Data.Comment: "This is bool_ldw_warnings_on (EyeQ LDW Early setting)"

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Middle_bool_LDW_Config.warnings_on
Data.Comment: "This is bool_ldw_warnings_on (EyeQ LDW Middle setting)"

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Late_bool_LDW_Config.warnings_on
Data.Comment: "This is bool_ldw_warnings_on (EyeQ LDW Late setting)"

Data.Name: LDW_Config.Early_corridor_outer_boundary

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: RoutineControl_EDR_Reset.Request_Result
Request.Comment: the purpose of this routine is to erase all the EDR Flash memory.

Request.Name: RoutineControl_Aiming_Check_Mode.Request_Result
Request.Comment: Request Result Aiming Routine - Check Mode

Request.Name: RoutineControl_Aiming_Reset_Mode.Request_Result
Request.Comment: Request Result Aiming Routine - Reset to Initial Mode

Request.Name: RoutineControl_EDR_Reset.Stop
Request.Comment: the purpose of this routine is to erase all the EDR Flash memory.

Request.Name: RoutineControl_Aiming_Reset_Mode.Stop
Request.Comment: Stop Aiming Routine - Reset to Initial Mode

Request.Name: RoutineControl_EDR_Reset.Start
Request.Comment: the purpose of this routine is to erase all the EDR Flash memory.

Request.Name: RoutineControl_Aiming_Reset_Mode.Start
Request.Comment: Start Aiming Routine - Reset to Initial Mode

Label.Text: Dctow - Camera to front axle distance (m)
Dco - Camera lens to vehicle centerline distance (m)
Dwtob - Front axle to front bumper distance (m)
Masking area in bottom side of FOV (pixels)
DID $4028 (Threshold of Distance Before Displaying the Long Press Button Message)
0 = use of only verified speed limits
Begin Mode : s (0) or m (1) selection
End Mode : s (0) or m (1) selection
Routine $31 $0201, Static Alignment on Target - TAC2
STEP 2 : $0202 RESET AIMING PARAMETERS TO INITIAL
Request results until the routine is complete
used by Nissan; Renault all 0s (leave empty)

Button.Text: Request Aiming Routine Results - Normal Mode

Label.Text: Masking area in bottom side of FOV (pixels)
Dctow - Camera to front axle distance (m)
Dwtob - Front axle to front bumper distance (m)
Dco - Camera lens to vehicle centerline distance (m)
